Off Calendar Feb-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Malindons LTD.
Dept. 514. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Nichole M. Rodich, CSR #11604. Telephone: 415-551-0616.

Michael Espinosa, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Leola Starks, as Wrongful Death Heir, and as Successor-in-Interest to Richard Starks, Deceased, Terry Starks and Jaree Adams, as Legal Heirs of Richard Starks, Deceased.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Malindons LTD.
Default was entered against defendant on July 15, 2011.
Statement of Damages was filed and served on July 15, 2011.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on January 8, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Leola Starks, as Wrongful Death Heir, and as Successor-in-Interest to Richard Starks, Deceased, and against the Defaulted Defendant Malindons LTD, as follows:

Economic Damages: $237,114.80.
Non-Economic Damages - $11,000,000.00.
Total - $11,237,114.80.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
